viewBox="0 0 400 300" width="100%" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="400" height="300" fill="#1A2B1A"/>
  <defs>
    <style>
      .anim-path { stroke-dasharray: 500; stroke-dashoffset: 500; animation: draw 0.6s forwards; }
      .anim-text { opacity: 0; animation: fade 0.35s forwards; }
      @keyframes draw { to { stroke-dashoffset: 0; } }
      @keyframes fade { to { opacity: 1; } }
    </style>
  </defs>

  <text x="200" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" class="anim-text" style="animation-delay: 0.1s">Return to Left Atrium</text>

  <!-- Left Atrium -->
  <path d="M180,120 C180,100 240,100 240,150 C240,200 180,200 180,180 Z" fill="#FF6B6B" fill-opacity="0.25" stroke="#FF6B6B" stroke-width="2" class="anim-path" style="animation-delay: 0.3s"/>
  <text x="210" y="155" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" class="anim-text" style="animation-delay: 0.4s">Left Atrium</text>

  <!-- Pulmonary Veins (Right) -->
  <path d="M240,130 C280,120 320,130 340,110" fill="none" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="3" class="anim-path" style="animation-delay: 0.6s"/>
  <path d="M240,150 C280,140 320,150 340,170" fill="none" stroke="#4FC3F7" stroke-width="3" class="anim-path" style="animation-delay: 0.9s"/>
  <text x="310" y="140" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" class="anim-text" style="animation-delay: 1.2s">Pulmonary Veins</text>

  <!-- Blood Flow Arrow -->
  <path d="M300,130 L260,130 L270,120 M260,130 L270,140" fill="none" stroke="#F5E3A0" stroke-width="2" class="anim-path" style="animation-delay: 1.5s"/>
  <text x="270" y="115" font-family="serif" fill="#F5E3A0" font-size="11" class="anim-text" style="animation-delay: 1.8s">O2 Rich Blood</text>

  <!-- Mitral Valve area -->
  <circle cx="180" cy="160" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#81C784" stroke-width="2" class="anim-path" style="animation-delay: 2.1s"/>
  <text x="130" y="165" font-family="serif" fill="#F0EDD0" font-size="11" class="anim-text" style="animation-delay: 2.4s">To Ventricle</text>
